testimonials.quote: Summit Build transformed our 1970s kitchen into something out of a magazine.

testimonials.quote: On time, on budget, and the crew was respectful of our home.

about.intro: Summit Build Co. is a family-owned general contracting firm serving the Denver metro area. We specialize in residential remodeling and additions, with a focus on quality materials, transparent pricing, and clean job sites.

team.name: Mark Reinhardt
team.title: Owner / Lead Contractor
team.bio: Licensed GC with 18 years of residential construction experience.

team.name: Elena Vasquez
team.title: Project Manager
team.bio: Coordinates scheduling, permits, and client communication.

contact.heading: Request a Free Estimate
contact.subheading: Describe your project and we will schedule an on-site visit.
